data.content:
## Implementation Plan: Make setup CLI additive

### Architecture (4 layers)

**Layer 1 — Shared TOML Reader** (`scripts/read-settings.sh`, ~150 lines NEW): Line-by-line state machine parsing settings.toml into existing KV store. Handles both shell-writer printf output and smol-toml stringify output. Handles quoted table keys (`[agents."copilot-gpt-5.2"]`), array-of-tables (`[[pools.X]]`), multi-line strings, inline arrays, booleans, integers. Populates EXISTING_AGENTS array + KV entries for all agents (command, label, model, agent_type, vendor, provider, agent_name, lease_model, flavor, version), actions, backend.type, defaults.profileId, terminalLightTheme, pools (counts, agent IDs, weights), scope refinement prompt.

**Layer 2 — Writer Fixes** (both scripts, ~65 lines MODIFY): (a) New `_toml_quote_key()` helper — bare keys pass through, others quoted with escaped internals. Applied to `[agents.X]` headers. (b) Emit all metadata fields (agent_type, vendor, provider, agent_name, lease_model, flavor, version) from KV when non-empty. (c) Replace hardcoded backend.type="auto", defaults.profileId="", and missing terminalLightTheme with KV lookups preserving loaded values.

**Layer 3 — Wizard Additive Behavior** (both scripts, ~170 lines MODIFY): (a) Load existing settings at main entry (`foolery_setup()` and `maybe_agent_wizard()`). Seed REGISTERED_AGENTS from EXISTING_AGENTS. (b) DELETE both `REGISTERED_AGENTS=()` resets (setup.sh:930, agent-wizard.sh:499). (c) DELETE single-agent overwrite branches (setup.sh:932-941, agent-wizard.sh:501-510). Replace with unified additive path: show existing agents, then for each detected agent show existing variants and offer to add new model variants — default No. Duplicate IDs checked via `_append_unique`. (d) Make `_prompt_action_mappings()` show current mapping per action, offer "Change? [y/N]" with default keep. (e) Make `_dispatch_wizard()` show current mode, add "Keep current" option. In advanced mode, `_prompt_single_pool()` shows existing entries and offers "Reconfigure? [y/N]" with default keep. (f) Make `_defaults_wizard()` show loaded values (not hardcoded 5/10) as bracket defaults.

**Layer 4 — Tests** (~650 lines NEW/MODIFY): (a) `test-read-settings.sh` (~120 lines): unit tests for reader against shell-writer and smol-toml formats, bare/quoted IDs, all fields, missing file. (b) `test-settings-roundtrip.sh` (~100 lines): write→read→write→diff idempotency, smol-toml cross-format, all metadata. (c) `test-setup-additive.sh` (~200 lines): PTY integration seeding advanced config (3 agents with full metadata, advanced pools with weights, custom scope prompt, maxConcurrentSessions=12, profileId="custom", terminalLightTheme=true), adding one model variant, asserting ALL fields preserved; single-agent-on-PATH preservation case. (d) `test-agent-wizard-additive.sh` (~180 lines): same structure for agent-wizard.sh. (e) `setup-settings-writer.test.ts` (~50 lines added): quoted IDs, metadata emission, non-agent setting preservation.

### Files Summary

| File | Action | ~Lines |
|---|---|---|
| scripts/read-settings.sh | NEW | 150 |
| scripts/setup.sh | MODIFY | 130 |
| scripts/agent-wizard.sh | MODIFY | 90 |
| scripts/test-read-settings.sh | NEW | 120 |
| scripts/test-settings-roundtrip.sh | NEW | 100 |
| scripts/test-setup-additive.sh | NEW | 200 |
| scripts/test-agent-wizard-additive.sh | NEW | 180 |
| src/lib/__tests__/setup-settings-writer.test.ts | MODIFY | 50 |
| **Total** | | **~1020** |

### Risks & Mitigations

1. **TOML parsing edge cases**: smol-toml may produce unexpected formats. Mitigated by round-trip tests (10b) against actual smol-toml output; reader only handles known schema shape.
2. **Bash 3.2 compat**: No associative arrays or bash 4+ features. Uses same KV helpers proven in both scripts.
3. **PTY test timing**: Uses `script` command (proven in existing tests) with deterministic input.
4. **Agent ID collision**: `_append_unique` check before registration; skip with log.

### Prior Feedback Coverage

All 12 prior rejection points addressed: (1) single-agent overwrite removed, (2) agent IDs quoted, (3) PTY tests against seeded advanced settings, (4) reader handles smol-toml, (5) both REGISTERED_AGENTS resets removed, (6) dispatch/pool editing additive with keep-by-default, (7) existing variants don't block new variants for same command, (8) agent-wizard.sh fully additive, (9) all metadata round-tripped, (10) model-picker shows existing + dedup, (11) PTY tests seed pools+metadata, (12) backend/defaults/terminalLightTheme preserved.

### Dependency Order

Step 1 (reader) → Steps 2-4 (writer fixes, parallel) → Steps 5-9 (wizard changes, parallel per script) → Step 10 (tests)
